proofClass: Tier B static routing ledger; not runtime proof

sourceEvidence.publicSafety: tracked static contract and routing metadata only; no raw payload bytes, sample chunks, exact local roots, private artifact locators, or runtime observations

historicalAnchors.note: Historical serialized parser/node-tree plus JPEG/default Huffman and inflate Huffman static read-back anchor.
Historical render/resource/texture/HUD tail static read-back anchor.

subsystemLanes.label: Archive/resource ingress
subsystemLanes.claim: Resource streams and mapped buffers route into texture load and decode planning.
subsystemLanes.boundary: Runtime archive-file behavior and exact asset extraction parity remain separate proof.

subsystemLanes.label: Texture lookup/lifetime
subsystemLanes.claim: Texture names, fallback behavior, list membership, and release paths are static planning anchors.
subsystemLanes.boundary: Exact CTexture layout and runtime D3D resource lifetime remain separate proof.

subsystemLanes.label: Serialized parser/node-tree
subsystemLanes.claim: Node payload constructors, serialized chunk registry, compatibility predicates, and selector diagnostics are static planning anchors.
subsystemLanes.boundary: Exact node, payload, chunk, hidden ABI, and runtime parser behavior remain separate proof.

subsystemLanes.label: Decode setup
subsystemLanes.claim: Decode scratch tables, image descriptors, component-plane setup, and job/block allocation are static planning anchors.
subsystemLanes.boundary: Runtime image fidelity and exact descriptor schemas remain separate proof.

subsystemLanes.label: Codec fronts
subsystemLanes.claim: Format dispatch and header/descriptor validation paths are static planning anchors.
subsystemLanes.boundary: Exact third-party source identity and runtime codec output remain separate proof.

subsystemLanes.label: JPEG entropy/Huffman
subsystemLanes.claim: JPEG default Huffman table and entropy writer rows are static planning anchors distinct from inflate.
subsystemLanes.boundary: Runtime JPEG output and exact entropy-writer layout remain separate proof.

subsystemLanes.label: Zlib/inflate/Huffman
subsystemLanes.claim: Inflate stream/state, code-state processing, dynamic literal/distance tree construction, and table-building rows are static planning anchors.
subsystemLanes.boundary: Exact z_stream, inflate state, table-entry schema, zlib source identity, and runtime decompression behavior remain separate proof.

subsystemLanes.label: Texel conversion/upload
subsystemLanes.claim: Packed texel conversion callback, profile factory, dither/non-dither path, and upload handoff rows are static planning anchors.
subsystemLanes.boundary: Runtime GPU upload, pixel correctness, and device behavior remain separate proof.

subsystemLanes.label: Render-facing handoff
subsystemLanes.claim: Texture decode routes into render buffers and sprite, mesh, and HUD render consumers as static planning context.
subsystemLanes.boundary: Runtime render correctness and visual QA remain separate proof.

proves: nine subsystem lane ids tied to the tracked texture/resource/decode static contract
Wave1163 and Wave1216 treated as provenance-only historical anchors while Wave1220 closeout remains current accounting authority
